items.title: Articulations Speak Louder Than Words
items.description: Reversing Babel: inside the language-agnostic redesign of speech-to-speech translation.

items.title: We’re addicted to you, don’t you know that you’re toxic?
items.description: At Télécom SudParis, researchers turn to Robert Sapolsky’s zebras as they rethink how AI sees toxicity.
items.author: Author
